fields.label: Aerele Admin URL
fields.description: HTTPS URL of the Aerele Jarvis admin (e.g. https://admin.aerele.in). Used for signup, billing, subscription state.

fields.label: Aerele Admin API Key
fields.description: Bearer token issued at signup; authenticates this customer's bench when calling the Aerele admin API.

fields.label: Monthly Token Budget
fields.description: 0 = unlimited. Otherwise hard cap before overage billing kicks in.

fields.label: Provider
fields.options:
Anthropic
OpenAI
Google Gemini
Mistral
Groq
Together AI
DeepSeek
Moonshot (Kimi)
OpenRouter
Ollama (local)
vLLM (local)
OpenAI-Compatible

fields.label: Model
fields.description: Provider-specific model identifier (e.g. claude-sonnet-4-6, gpt-4o, gemini-2.0-flash, deepseek-chat, moonshot-v1-32k, llama-3.1-70b).

fields.label: API Key
fields.description: API key for the chosen provider. Leave blank for local providers (Ollama, vLLM).

fields.label: Base URL
fields.description: Only for local or OpenAI-Compatible providers (e.g. http://localhost:11434/v1 for Ollama). Leave blank for hosted providers.

fields.label: Temperature
fields.description: 0.0 = deterministic, 1.0 = creative. 0.2 is a good default for analytical Q&A.

fields.label: Agent Operator
fields.description: Operator config — populated by jarvis.openclaw_bootstrap.start (dev) or the Aerele admin signup response (prod). Do not show to end users in production.

fields.label: Agent URL
fields.description: WebSocket URL for the customer's openclaw agent (e.g. ws://127.0.0.1:18789 in dev; wss://<subdomain>.jarvis.aerele.in:443 in prod)

fields.label: Agent Token
fields.description: Bearer token used to authenticate the secrets.reload RPC and the chat worker's WebSocket session

fields.label: Agent LLM Key Path
fields.description: Absolute host path to the SecretRef'd LLM key file (auto-populated by jarvis.openclaw_bootstrap.start in dev; by admin signup response in prod)

fields.label: Agent Config Path
fields.description: Absolute host path to the rendered openclaw.json (auto-populated by jarvis.openclaw_bootstrap.start in dev; by admin signup response in prod)

fields.label: Agent Compose Directory
fields.description: Directory containing docker-compose.yml (auto-populated by jarvis.openclaw_bootstrap.start in dev; by admin signup response in prod)
